features: Engineered with precision cut steel for up to 15 shaves per blade
3 blades for a classic smooth shave
Stronger-than-steel blades stay sharper for longer (vs. Sensor3)
Up to 8 months of shaves per pack
description: Product Description Gillette Mach3 men’s razor is a 3-bladed razor designed for a classic close shave . The 3-blade razor refills for men are equipped with an improved lubrication strip that gives you extra glide*. The men’s razor refills with Lubrastrip feature stronger-than-steel blades that give you up to 15 comfortable shaves. Concerned your Gillette handle won't fit? All of our Mach 3 razor blades fit all Mach 3 razor handles. *vs previous Mach3 Directions To use Gillette Mach3 Razor Blades, first remove the old cartridge by opening the razor handle and pulling out the old cartridge. Insert the new cartridge into the razor handle by aligning it with the slots and pushing it in until it clicks into place. Close the razor handle. Prepare the razor for shaving by ensuring the blades are exposed and the lubrication strip is properly aligned. For maintenance, clean the razor after each use and lubricate the cartridge or razor as needed to ensure optimal performance and blade longevity. Manufacturer Contact Information Procter & Gamble UK, Weybridge, Surrey, KT13 0XP See more
